---
title: "Projects"
toc: false
---

::: {.pub-entry}
::: {.pub-venue}
Personal Project · 2024
:::
::: {.pub-title}
Weekly AI Paper-Triage Agent
:::
::: {.pub-meta}
Multi-agent pipeline (OpenAI API, Python): weekly arXiv / PubMed scan → LLM summarisation → interest-based scoring (0–10) → automated email digest. In active personal use since 2024. Demonstrates production LLM-agent design: scheduler, structured output, email delivery, and prompt-engineered relevance scoring.

Tech: Python · OpenAI API · Gmail API · SQLite · GitHub Actions 

[GitHub](https://github.com/PierpaoloV/weekly_ai_paper){.btn-secondary-custom .btn-sm}
:::
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
::: {.pub-venue}
Personal Project · 2026
:::
::: {.pub-title}
AI Job Search Agent
:::
::: {.pub-meta}
Automated job-hunting pipeline that fetches LinkedIn, Indeed, and Glassdoor alert emails via Gmail API, parses structured job listings, deduplicates against a SQLite store, and ranks each role 0–1 with GPT-4o-mini against a personal résumé and preferences profile. Top matches are pushed as a ranked Telegram digest. Runs on GitHub Actions three times per day with no manual intervention.

Tech: Python · OpenAI API · Gmail API · SQLite · GitHub Actions · Telegram Bot API

[GitHub](https://github.com/PierpaoloV/job-agent){.btn-secondary-custom .btn-sm}
:::
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
::: {.pub-venue}
PhD Dissertation · Radboud University Medical Center · 2021 – 2024
:::
::: {.pub-title}
Learning from Histopathology Images: AI-Driven Biomarkers for Pancreatic Ductal Adenocarcinoma
:::
::: {.pub-meta}
PhD thesis focusing on the development of artificial intelligence methods for digital pathology in pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PDAC).
It addresses major challenges in prognostic assessment through automated tumor segmentation, biomarker quantification, and survival prediction from whole-slide histopathology images.
A central contribution is the development of robust pipelines for tumor-stroma ratio analysis and other interpretable morphological biomarkers associated with patient outcome.
The work also evaluates multiple deep learning feature extraction strategies for their ability to predict overall survival across different datasets.
The findings demonstrate the potential of computational pathology to improve the speed, consistency, and clinical relevance of histopathological assessment in pancreatic cancer.
Overall, the thesis contributes scalable and interpretable AI-based tools that support prognostic modeling and future precision oncology research.

[GitHub](https://github.com/PierpaoloV/PhD-Dissertation){.btn-secondary-custom .btn-sm}
[Download PDF](https://github.com/PierpaoloV/PhD-Dissertation/raw/main/PhD_Dissertation.pdf){.btn-secondary-custom .btn-sm}

:::
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
::: {.pub-venue}
Open Source Framework
:::
::: {.pub-title}
Pathology Segmentation Pipeline
:::
::: {.pub-meta}
A Docker-based pipeline for training and deploying deep learning segmentation models on Whole Slide Images (WSI). Built around an asynchronous tile inference engine, it supports tissue/background segmentation, multi-tissue classification, epithelium segmentation, and tumour-stroma ratio (TSR) computation for Pancreatic Cancer WSIs. The pipeline is also available as a pre-built image on DockerHub at `pierpaolov93/pathology-pipeline:latest`.

Tech: PyTorch · Docker · HuggingFace · Python

[GitHub](https://github.com/PierpaoloV/pathology-segmentation-pipeline){.btn-secondary-custom .btn-sm}
[DockerHub](https://hub.docker.com/r/pierpaolov93/pathology-pipeline){.btn-secondary-custom .btn-sm}
:::
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
::: {.pub-venue}
Postdoc Research · Prinses Maxima Centre · 2025 - Present
:::
::: {.pub-title}
Wilms Tumor Anaplasia Grading
:::
::: {.pub-meta}
Deep-learning and multiple-instance learning pipelines for anaplasia detection and clinical outcome prediction from pediatric kidney tumor WSIs. Multi-center dataset integration across European collaborating hospitals.

Tech: PyTorch · MIL · Docker · multi-center data pipelines

[GitHub](https://github.com/PierpaoloV/wilms-anaplasia-mil){.btn-secondary-custom .btn-sm}

:::
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
::: {.pub-venue}
PhD Research · Radboud UMC · 2021 – 2024
:::
::: {.pub-title}
Automatic Quantification of Tumor-Stroma Ratio as a prognostic biomarker for pancreatic cancer.
:::
::: {.pub-meta}
Developed an automated whole-slide image analysis pipeline for pancreatic cancer within the EU Horizon 2020 PANCAIM consortium. Using multi-class U-Net models for tissue and tumor segmentation, the method achieved external Dice scores up to 0.86 across a multi-center cohort of 368 patients from 25 Dutch pathology laboratories. The extracted tumor-stroma ratio biomarker showed prognostic value, reaching an AUC of 0.61 for 6-month survival prediction.

Tech: PyTorch · MONAI · Docker · SLURM · Python

[GitHub](https://github.com/DIAGNijmegen/automatic-tsr-quantification-for-pdac){.btn-secondary-custom .btn-sm}

:::
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
::: {.pub-venue}
Master's Thesis · University of Girona · 2020
:::
::: {.pub-title}
MRI Synthesis: ResU-Net vs. GAN Benchmarking
:::
::: {.pub-meta}
Benchmarked ResU-Net, cGAN, and CycleGAN for T1↔FLAIR MRI synthesis on WMH and BraTS 2018 datasets. ResU-Net achieved superior SSIM and lower MSE under data-scarce conditions. Grade: 8.6/10.

Tech: Keras · TensorFlow · Python · medical image registration

[GitHub](https://github.com/PierpaoloV/mri-brain-synthesis-from-scratch){.btn-secondary-custom .btn-sm}

:::
:::
